name_en: M12088 Large Bella Bucket Bag from the Flight Mode collection. This piece features classic perforated leather rendered with a seasonal gradient effect, while the lining continues the fresh tones of the body. A removable coin pouch ensures tidy storage, making it a modern choice that transcends the winter season.
name_cn:
M12088 Large Bella Bucket Bag from the Flight Mode collection. This piece features classic perforated leather rendered with a seasonal gradient effect, while the lining continues the fresh tones of the body. A removable coin pouch ensures tidy storage, making it a modern choice that transcends the winter season.
30 x 28 x 16 cm
(H x W x D)
Perforated calfskin leather
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Round coin pouch
Metal studs on base
Fits short wallet, smartphone, keys, and earphones
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Drop: 50.0 cm
Drop extends to: 56.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, removable
